CustomField.description: Number of days from NEPA process start date to the statutory or regulatory deadline for this permit. Populated at record creation from RegulatoryAuthorizationType.nepa_statutory_deadline_days__c. Used to calculate nepa_sla_due_date__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days from process start to permit deadline per statute or regulation.
CustomField.label: Statutory Deadline (Days)
